smartrecruiters cern:be css isa 2026 115.title: AI Solutions Engineer (BE-CSS-ISA-2026-115-LD)
smartrecruiters cern:be css isa 2026 115.fit_reasons: Direct hit on agentic AI/LLM/RAG specialism (LangChain/LlamaIndex, RAG pipelines, vector DBs, agentic AI orchestration) plus strongest possible employer resonance (CERN, ex-ATLAS PhD background). Python-centric stack matches his expert-level skill.
smartrecruiters cern:be css isa 2026 115.requirements: Master's or equivalent in CS/related field; solid Python; LLM frameworks (LangChain/LlamaIndex); RAG pipelines, vector databases, chunking/embeddings; agentic AI orchestration; MLOps/CI-CD. English fluent, French a developing asset. 40h/week hybrid, 5-year LD contract.

smartrecruiters cern:ep ali sc 2026 106.title: GPU & ML Developer for Reconstruction and Simulation (EP-ALI-SC-2026-106-GRAP)
smartrecruiters cern:ep ali sc 2026 106.fit_reasons: Otherwise excellent specialism/domain/employer match (GPU+ML for ALICE detector reconstruction), but this is a CERN Graduate Programme (GRAP) posting — entry-level track (experienceLevel: Entry Level; PhD track capped at <=3 yrs post-PhD). Mario is ~6 yrs post-PhD, so this is very likely ineligible per the CERN early-career caveat.
smartrecruiters cern:ep ali sc 2026 106.requirements: Master's + 2-6 yrs post-grad OR PhD with <=3 yrs post-grad, Physics/related; C++, CUDA/HIP GPU programming, ML inference (ONNXRuntime); fully onsite; 24-month contract; closes 2026-07-01 (today).

smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 136 ld.title: Lead Simulation Physicist - High-Performance Detector Simulation (EP-SFT-2026-136-LD)
smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 136 ld.fit_reasons: Strong scientific-computing/HPC specialism and physics/CERN domain+employer resonance, PhD-level Lead role matching his seniority and Monte Carlo/GPU simulation background. Not a classic ML/DS title, so scored as a strong adjacent fit rather than a core hit.
smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 136 ld.requirements: PhD in Physics or related; Monte Carlo particle transport simulation; GPU implementation (CUDA); C++, Geant4, Python; optimizing large scientific codebases. English fluent, French developing. Hybrid, LD staff contract.

smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 137 ld.title: Software Engineer - High-Performance Computing (EP-SFT-2026-137-LD)
smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 137 ld.fit_reasons: Good HPC/scientific-computing specialism and CERN/physics resonance (C++, GPU/CUDA, optimizing 100k+ line scientific codebases) matching his HPC/FPGA/OpenCL background, but no explicit ML/DS content and no senior/lead title bonus.
smartrecruiters cern:ep sft 2026 137 ld.requirements: Master's/PhD in CS/Physics; HPC, GPU programming (CUDA/SYCL), C++ (SIMD, template metaprogramming); Geant4, ROOT, LLVM/Clang, MPI/TBB. English fluent, French developing. Hybrid, LD staff contract.

lever sonarsource:3694f242 8346 4c76 826.title: Senior AI Engineer

h:6b94f90e0d284559.fit_reasons: PhD-level research-org role using HPC, Linux, reproducible computational workflows and ML on biological data — resonates with his HPC/scientific-computing background and research-org profile, though the domain (genomics) is a stretch from fintech/healthcare/energy/physics.

h:46f3622d97e24ae6.fit_reasons: EPFL research-org resonance and ML doctorate requirement fit his PhD background, but the control-theory/aerodynamics focus and top-tier ML-publication bar don't match his applied industry AI specialism, and postdoc framing sits below his target seniority.

h:7abccbe170c1c16c.fit_reasons: Senior/PhD-level AI leadership role (10-20 yrs) covering AI/data architectures, GPU infrastructure and AI product strategy — matches his PhD-plus-senior-AI-architect profile, with French required only at intermediate level.
h:7abccbe170c1c16c.requirements: PhD or Postdoc in AI/Data Science or related; 10-20 yrs experience; French (intermediate); AI/data architectures, GPU infrastructure, AI product development.
